'''zhahava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderlessness|leaderlessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderlessness|leaderlessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhahava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæhævæth|zhæhævæth]] || [[word:zhæhævæj|zhæhævæj]] || [[word:zhæhævæsh|zhæhævæsh]] || [[word:zhæhævæ|zhæhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahahavath|zhahahavath]] || [[word:zhahahavaj|zhahahavaj]] || [[word:zhahahavash|zhahahavash]] || [[word:zhahahava|zhahahava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahavath|zhahavath]] || [[word:zhahavaj|zhahavaj]] || [[word:zhahavash|zhahavash]] || [[word:zhahava|zhahava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahafvath|zhahafvath]] || [[word:zhahafvaj|zhahafvaj]] || [[word:zhahafvash|zhahafvash]] || [[word:zhahafvaf|zhahafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhahavatha|zhahavatha]] || [[word:zhahavaja|zhahavaja]] || [[word:zhahavasha|zhahavasha]] || [[word:zhahavaka|zhahavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhahavath|zhahavath]] || [[word:zhahavaj|zhahavaj]] || [[word:zhahavash|zhahavash]] || [[word:zhahava|zhahava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhahavathal|zhahavathal]] || [[word:zhahavajal|zhahavajal]] || [[word:zhahavashal|zhahavashal]] || [[word:zhahavakal|zhahavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhahavathatha|zhahavathatha]] || [[word:zhahavajaja|zhahavajaja]] || [[word:zhahavashasha|zhahavashasha]] || [[word:zhahavaka|zhahavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhahavathan|zhahavathan]] || [[word:zhahavajan|zhahavajan]] || [[word:zhahavashan|zhahavashan]] || [[word:zhahavakan|zhahavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhahavathaoro|zhahavathaoro]] || [[word:zhahavajaoro|zhahavajaoro]] || [[word:zhahavashaoro|zhahavashaoro]] || [[word:zhahavakaoro|zhahavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
